kw.name: Run Keywords
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Mikae\\OneDrive\\Tiedostot\\Front-end\\hyte-projekti\\browser\\traces\\temp\\1c904a86-3073-46c7-b95e-308480cb776f"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: Uuden päiväkirjamerkinnän lisääminen

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'robot' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'robot1234' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg:
${content} = HealthDiary Dashboard Diary Workouts Goals Progress Contact Logout Päiväkirjamerkinnät Add entry 15.6.2025 😌 Mood: Hyvä ⚖️ Weight: 75.00 💤 Sleep: 8
Automaattitesti - Robot Framework

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Testaa uuden merkinnän luominen täyttämällä kaikki lomakekentät

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
